div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Greece (Capps)
div.p: 106. Your 265, 270,Papers on this subject were published by Great Britain in Parliament Papers (Cmd. 1230): United States No. 1 (1921) “Correspondence Respecting Alleged Delay by British Authorities of Telegrams to and from the United States”. and 271 concerning return of King Constantine to Greece. Department sees no reason why recognition should not be extended to King Constantine as soon as he assumes office and formally announces to this Government his accession to the throne, at which time you will be given new credentials.
